Nacho Libre (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $80,197,993Details
International Box Office $19,098,469
Worldwide Box Office $99,296,462
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $47,104,904
Total $47,104,904
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$28,309,599 (35.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.83 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:80.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$32,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,070 opening theaters/3,083 max. theaters, 4.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $146,437,857

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 16th, 2006 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
Video Release: October 24th, 2006 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for some rough action, and crude humor including dialogue.
Running Time: 90 minutes
Geographical setting: Mexico
Plot point: Miscellaneous Sports, Monks and Nuns, Wrestling
Source material: Inspired by a True Story
Subgenre: Sports Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Nickelodeon Films, Black & White, Paramount Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
